req.title: Account statement generation
req.statement: A customer shall request monthly statements as PDF; statements older than 7 years shall be fetched from cold storage.

doc.reasoning: The requirement covers four distinct behaviours: (1) happy-path PDF delivery for a recent statement, (2) cold-storage retrieval for statements older than 7 years, (3) 404 when no activity exists in a period, and (4) 503 when cold storage is unavailable. The 7-year threshold is a natural boundary. EP partitions are: recent statements (<=7 yrs), archived statements (>7 yrs), missing-activity periods, and unavailable cold storage. BVA targets exactly 7 years ago (boundary month). NEG covers the 404 and 503 error paths. STC captures the state change from hot to cold storage retrieval. DT captures the combined condition of caller ownership plus cold-storage availability.

tests.name: test_recent_statement_returns_pdf
preconditions: Authenticated customer token is available via <auth_token_fixture>
Account has activity in the target month (e.g. current month minus 1)
Statement is within the 7-year hot-storage window
actions: GET /statements/{month} with month = first day of last calendar month
Pass Authorization header with valid customer bearer token
expected: Response body is a non-empty byte stream starting with %PDF
trace: R-FIN-008: customer shall request monthly statements as PDF
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta

def test_recent_statement_returns_pdf(auth_token_fixture, api_client, audit_log_helper):
    last_month = (date.today().replace(day=1) - timedelta(days=1)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token_fixture}"}

    resp = api_client.get(f"/statements/{last_month}", headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert resp.headers["Content-Type"] == "application/pdf"
    assert resp.content[:4] == b"%PDF"
    assert len(resp.content) > 0
    assert resp.headers.get("X-Retrieval-Source") == "hot-storage"
    assert audit_log_helper.has_entry(action="statement_retrieved", month=last_month)

tests.name: test_statement_older_than_7_years_fetched_from_cold_storage
preconditions: Authenticated customer token is available via <auth_token_fixture>
Account has activity in the month exactly 7 years and 1 month ago (first month beyond the hot-storage boundary)
actions: Compute target_month as exactly 85 months ago (7 years + 1 month)
trace: R-FIN-008: statements older than 7 years shall be fetched from cold storage
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_statement_older_than_7_years_fetched_from_cold_storage(
    auth_token_fixture, api_client, audit_log_helper
):
    target_date = date.today().replace(day=1) - relativedelta(months=85)
    target_month = target_date.strftime("%Y-%m")
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token_fixture}"}

    resp = api_client.get(f"/statements/{target_month}", headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert resp.headers["Content-Type"] == "application/pdf"
    assert resp.content[:4] == b"%PDF"
    assert resp.headers.get("X-Retrieval-Source") == "cold-storage"
    assert audit_log_helper.has_entry(
        action="statement_retrieved", month=target_month, source="cold-storage"
    )

tests.name: test_statement_for_inactive_period_returns_404
preconditions: Authenticated customer token is available via <auth_token_fixture>
Account has NO activity in the target month (ensured by <ensure_no_activity_fixture>)
actions: GET /statements/{month} for a month known to have no transactions
expected: Response JSON contains error code NO_ACTIVITY_IN_PERIOD
trace: R-FIN-008: 404 if no activity in period
tests.executable:
import pytest

def test_statement_for_inactive_period_returns_404(
    auth_token_fixture, api_client, ensure_no_activity_fixture
):
    inactive_month = ensure_no_activity_fixture  # returns e.g. "2010-02"
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token_fixture}"}

    resp = api_client.get(f"/statements/{inactive_month}", headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 404
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("error") == "NO_ACTIVITY_IN_PERIOD"
    assert resp.headers.get("Content-Type", "").startswith("application/json")

tests.name: test_cold_storage_unavailable_returns_503
preconditions: Authenticated customer token is available via <auth_token_fixture>
Cold storage service is simulated as DOWN via <mock_cold_storage_down_fixture>
Requested month is older than 7 years so cold storage path is triggered
actions: GET /statements/{month} for a month 9 years ago with valid Authorization header
expected: Response JSON contains error code COLD_STORAGE_UNAVAILABLE
trace: R-FIN-008: statements older than 7 years shall be fetched from cold storage
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_cold_storage_unavailable_returns_503(
    auth_token_fixture, api_client, mock_cold_storage_down_fixture
):
    target_date = date.today().replace(day=1) - relativedelta(years=9)
    target_month = target_date.strftime("%Y-%m")
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token_fixture}"}

    with mock_cold_storage_down_fixture:
        resp = api_client.get(f"/statements/{target_month}", headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 503
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("error") == "COLD_STORAGE_UNAVAILABLE"
    assert "Retry-After" in resp.headers

tests.name: test_statement_exactly_at_7_year_boundary_uses_hot_storage
preconditions: Authenticated customer token is available via <auth_token_fixture>
Account has activity exactly 7 years ago (boundary month inclusive in hot storage)
actions: Compute target_month as exactly 84 months ago (7 years * 12)
expected: X-Retrieval-Source header equals hot-storage (boundary is inclusive on hot side)
trace: R-FIN-008: statements older than 7 years shall be fetched from cold storage (boundary off-by-one check)
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_statement_exactly_at_7_year_boundary_uses_hot_storage(
    auth_token_fixture, api_client
):
    target_date = date.today().replace(day=1) - relativedelta(months=84)
    target_month = target_date.strftime("%Y-%m")
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token_fixture}"}

    resp = api_client.get(f"/statements/{target_month}", headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert resp.headers["Content-Type"] == "application/pdf"
    assert resp.headers.get("X-Retrieval-Source") == "hot-storage"

tests.name: test_unauthorized_caller_cannot_access_statement
preconditions: Token belonging to a DIFFERENT customer is available via <other_customer_token_fixture>
Target account has activity in the specified month
actions: GET /statements/{month} using a token whose subject does NOT match account.owner
expected: Response JSON contains error code ACCOUNT_OWNERSHIP_MISMATCH
trace: R-FIN-008: precondition account.owner == caller must be enforced
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta

def test_unauthorized_caller_cannot_access_statement(
    other_customer_token_fixture, api_client
):
    last_month = (date.today().replace(day=1) - timedelta(days=1)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {other_customer_token_fixture}"}

    resp = api_client.get(f"/statements/{last_month}", headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 403
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("error") == "ACCOUNT_OWNERSHIP_MISMATCH"

tests.name: test_cold_storage_state_transition_hot_to_cold
preconditions: Authenticated customer token is available via <auth_token_fixture>
One statement is within hot storage (6 years ago), another is in cold storage (8 years ago)
actions: GET /statements/{cold_month} - expect cold-storage source, confirming state transition
expected: First request returns HTTP 200 with X-Retrieval-Source=hot-storage
Second request returns HTTP 200 with X-Retrieval-Source=cold-storage
trace: R-FIN-008: statements older than 7 years shall be fetched from cold storage
R-FIN-008: PDF delivered for both storage tiers
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_cold_storage_state_transition_hot_to_cold(auth_token_fixture, api_client):
    today = date.today().replace(day=1)
    hot_month = (today - relativedelta(years=6)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    cold_month = (today - relativedelta(years=8)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token_fixture}"}

    hot_resp = api_client.get(f"/statements/{hot_month}", headers=headers)
    assert hot_resp.status_code == 200
    assert hot_resp.headers["Content-Type"] == "application/pdf"
    assert hot_resp.headers.get("X-Retrieval-Source") == "hot-storage"

    cold_resp = api_client.get(f"/statements/{cold_month}", headers=headers)
    assert cold_resp.status_code == 200
    assert cold_resp.headers["Content-Type"] == "application/pdf"
    assert cold_resp.headers.get("X-Retrieval-Source") == "cold-storage"
